name: Amit Sharma
commentDescription: The doctors and staff are very helpful. Best hospital in our area.

name: Priya Patel
commentDescription: The hospital is very clean and the treatment was done on time. Staff is polite.

name: Suman Verma
commentDescription: Online doctor booking was very easy. Fast and good service.

name: Vikram Singh
commentDescription: Brought my father here late at night. Quick response by doctors and great emergency team.

name: Anjali Gupta
commentDescription: The consultations fees are affordable and they maintain good pharmacy inventory.

name: Rohan Malhotra
commentDescription: Very well organized healthcare facility. Lab tests reports were delivered digitally on time.
